_meta.description: Phase 4 v9 testnet deploy artifacts (plan-026 — Seal content protection; D-074/D-075/D-076). FRESH republish (not a compatible upgrade): adds `sealed_key`/`seal_id`/`preview_blob_ids`/`seal_version` fields to the Model3D `key` struct, edits the ModelPublished event layout (adds is_encrypted + preview_blob_ids), drops the `is_encrypted` param from `publish`/`new_model` (now DERIVED from policy), and changes entry-fn signatures (new `publish_encrypted`, `mint_tokens`; amended launch gate). Each is independently layout-/ABI-breaking → fresh original-id, abandoning v8 state (consistent with the v3–v8 precedent; no migrated frontend or demo pre-bake depends on v8 objects). New surface: `SealIdRegistry` (bootstrapped + shared in `init`, enforces global seal_id uniqueness — Resolution G), `seal_approve_cap`/`seal_approve_creator` (Seal key-server dry-run gate), `validate_seal_publish` (ALLOW_LIST⇒fee>0). v9 re-bootstrapped a fresh TransferPolicy<NftToken> (royalty rule only, D-036 carry-forward). Per D-009: testnet is the 6/21 submission target; mainnet ceremony deferred to the 8/27 prize window.
_meta.package_version: v9 (Phase 4, plan-026 — Seal content protection; Model3D seal fields + publish_encrypted + seal_approve + SealIdRegistry; fresh republish, single package id)
_meta.transfer_policy_rules: royalty_rule ONLY (D-036 carry-forward). Verified at the v9 bootstrap: the bootstrap tx created exactly one RuleKey dynamic field (id 0x4569a35e…) keyed by the royalty rule TypeName under kiosk_apps_package_id 0xe308bb3e….
_meta.seal_id_registry: Shared SealIdRegistry bootstrapped in `init` (D-075 Resolution G). `publish_encrypted` asserts a new model's seal_id is absent here before recording it, guaranteeing the global uniqueness that backs the is_prefix(model.seal_id, id) binding in seal_approve. Frontend reads `seal_id_registry_id` for the encrypted-publish PTB.
_meta.seal_key_servers_testnet: Mysten Open-mode 2-of-3 (threshold 2): 0x73d05d62…356db75, 0xf5d14a81…591623c8 (hardcoded in frontend/src/seal/sealClient.ts). Mainnet needs a contracted provider (deferred).
_meta.kiosk_apps_package_id_discovery: Unchanged from v2–v8 (deps pinned identically — apps@7a07937). The deployed TransferPolicy<NftToken> royalty rule TypeName lives under 0xe308bb3e…. Frontend MUST use the address pinned here, NOT the @mysten/kiosk SDK defaults — otherwise confirm_request fails the rule membership check.
